_researchNotes.taxonomyNote: Restore Britain sits at the extreme boundary of 'the right' per the Trilling criterion. Core policy (mass deportation requiring ECHR/Human Rights Act withdrawal) constitutes serious challenge to judicial independence and rule of law. Party has attracted neo-fascist support. Classification held as interpretive question, not settled finding. See sourced-reform-uk-and-restore-britain-v0_1_0.md CRITICAL TAXONOMY NOTE.
